## Entities.Inventory.MoldInventoryLibrary.addEntry() method

Adds a new inventory entry.

**Signature:**

```typescript
addEntry(collectionId: SourceId, entryId: MoldInventoryEntryBaseId, entry: IMoldInventoryEntry): Result<MoldInventoryEntryId>;
```
